description: Hand-labelled recall benchmark for the grounded-answer pipeline. Each case is (query, context, expected, offline_corpus). Positive cases declare expected via domains/url_substrings/chapter_slugs; adversarial negatives declare expected:{none:true} and the scorer rewards zero citations as the correct outcome. Adversarial cases may also declare expected.allow_weak:N (default 0) to soft-tolerate up to N weak citations as still-correct abstention — see bench/grounded_recall.py:_score_case. Coverage spans AHSEC, SEBA and Degree subjects, Assamese-language queries (as), PYQ-style prompts and image/figure lookups.
